body:
Office tour with @traceeellisross.
 
We collaborated with Tracee Ellis Ross to design the @patternbeauty Los Angeles office as a space that’s as expressive as its visionary founder. Tracee worked closely with DWR’s design team to create a warm, layered, and optimistic environment that reflects the brand’s ethos while supporting the needs of its team.
 
Tap the link in bio to watch the full office tour on YouTube.
 
Video by @micaiahcarter
